name: AI-research alone no longer forces a non-broad, untracked event onto the board (WP-92); confidence still does not gate; empty streaming never drops an event
description: WP-92 scoped the old ai-research auto-pass: source:'ai-research' is NO LONGER relevant on its own. An AI-found event must ALSO be a broadly-followed sport OR match a tracked entity — so a low-confidence tennis challenger with no tracked player drops (ai-low-tennis), while a low-confidence biathlon sprint stays because biathlon IS broadly followed (ai-low-norsk). Among the events that ARE relevant, confidence still does NOT gate feed inclusion (a notification planner, WP-15, may gate low confidence later — the FEED does not), and empty streaming is a 'where to watch unknown' rendering state, never a reason to drop. The accent still follows the ordinary must-see rules, so the Norwegian biathlon sprint with a Norwegian in the field is accented.
